landing.title: Take your community to the next level.
landing.intro: Rankoon brings leveling, voice management, and clear insights together in a dashboard built around your server.
landing.featuresTitle: Tools that work to your server's rhythm.
landing.xpText: Reward activity, unlock roles, and make progress visible for everyone.
landing.voiceText: Temporary channels appear exactly when your members need them.
landing.logsText: Track activity, commands, and errors in clear reporting.
landing.closingTitle: Give your community a strong foundation.
